title: FOIL Algorithm Learning Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of the First-Order Inductive Learner (FOIL) algorithm for learning a Horn clause.
elements: Start with positive and negative examples
Add a literal to the clause
Refine clause by adding more literals
relationships: Process starts by initializing a clause, then iteratively adds literals and evaluates coverage until a perfect clause is found, which is added to the growing theory; the loop continues until all positive examples are covered
